# ControlPro Wiring Guide

Notice!



Due to Microsoft decommissioning Internet Explorer recently, our firmware web updater no longer functions.  Please download our PC application to update your firmware.

[Download PC Application](https://catalog.pac-audio.com/firmware?id_firmware=162)

![](https://pac-audio.com/cdn/shop/files/mecp.png?v=1715568111&width=120)

[![](https://pac-audio.com/cdn/shop/files/PAC_logo.png?v=1706798660&width=120)](https://pac-audio.com/)

[![](https://pac-audio.com/cdn/shop/files/stinger_logo.png?v=1706798809&width=120)](https://stingersolutions.com/)

[![](https://pac-audio.com/cdn/shop/files/audio_control_logo.png?v=1706798855&width=120)](https://www.audiocontrol.com/car-audio/)

[![](https://pac-audio.com/cdn/shop/files/echomaster_logo.png?v=1706798908&width=120)](https://echomaster.com/)

[![](https://pac-audio.com/cdn/shop/files/motion_logo.png?v=1706798954&width=120)](https://m2minmotion.com/)
